description: "Bagnoli" presents a raw, unfiltered glimpse into the industrial decay and resilient life of a once-thriving Naples neighborhood in 2002. Through stark documentary images, the project captures the tension between abandonment and community, revealing the complexities of urban decline and human endurance.

description: In *Varsaw* (2002), the quiet moments of solitary urban life unfold through the gaze of a lone senior woman navigating the fringes of Warsaw. Amid dirt tracks, fading walls, and scattered signs of poverty, her stillness evokes contemplation and a subtle tension between loneliness and resilience. The interplay of light and shadow, lens flare, and muted color palettes capture both the weight of time and the fragile persistence of simple, daily routines.

subtitle: Street photography

texts.content: In *Varsaw* (2002), the quiet moments of solitary urban life unfold through the gaze of a lone senior woman navigating the fringes of Warsaw. Amid dirt tracks, fading walls, and scattered signs of poverty, her stillness evokes contemplation and a subtle tension between loneliness and resilience. The interplay of light and shadow, lens flare, and muted color palettes capture both the weight of time and the fragile persistence of simple, daily routines.

title: Varsaw
